name: Shrimp Baked with Feta Ouzo & Cognac
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the tomatoes into small pieces.
2. Heat 4 tablespoons olive oil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add onion and garlic; sauté until softened.
4. Stir in the tomatoes, sugar, salt, and pepper. Simmer, uncovered, for about 15 minutes or until the mixture thickens.
5. Melt butter and add 2 tablespoons olive oil to a large, heavy skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Add shrimp; sauté until they turn pink.
7. Stir in ouzo and cognac, then flame the shrimp briefly by holding them away from the flames for a few seconds.
8. Place shrimp in a casserole dish or individual ramekins.
9. Spoon tomato sauce over the shrimp.
10. Sprinkle with crumbled feta cheese and chopped parsley.
11. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 10 minutes, or until the feta melts and the dish is heated through.
(Preparation can be completed ahead of time; defrost when ready to use. For a less hot oven setting, bake covered at 400°F (200°C) for 10-15 minutes.)
